title: cerefolium cerefolium
intro: Cerefolium cerefolium, also known as Chamaemelum nobile, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, commonly referred to as chamomile. The medicinal properties of cerefolium cerefolium lie in its calming and soothing effects, which have been used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress relief and promoting a good night's sleep. Cerefolium cerefolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or oil, and is also used in skincare products due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
